pages.text: Exploration has 4 core tiers. Item IDs and book names match exactly: kubejs:exploration_core_t1, kubejs:exploration_core_t2, etc.

$(li)$(item)kubejs:exploration_core_t1$() gates: minecraft:spyglass, minecraft:compass
$(li)$(item)kubejs:exploration_core_t2$() gates: minecraft:ender_eye, minecraft:experience_bottle
$(li)$(item)kubejs:exploration_core_t3$() gates: minecraft:ancient_debris
$(li)$(item)kubejs:exploration_core_t4$() gates: crafts the next core and prepares the path
